articles.title: AI-LINKED CRYPTO TOKENS INCREASE AS JENSEN HUANG TALKS AGENTIC FUTURE
articles.summary: During Nvidia's GTC keynote, CEO Jensen Huang projected $1 trillion in chip demand through 2027. This outlook drove double-digit gains for AI-linked tokens NEAR, FET, and GRASS. The increase reflects investor interest in blockchain's role supporting autonomous agentic AI systems and decentralized computing infrastructure.

articles.title: POLYMARKET BETTORS THREATEN REPORTER OVER MISSILE REPORT
articles.summary: Emanuel Fabian, a Times of Israel military correspondent, says he received dozens of messages and explicit death threats after reporting that an Iranian projectile struck an open area near Beit Shemesh on March 10. Bettors tried to get him to change this report because it affected a Polymarket contract that had more than $14 million wagered. The episode highlights how high-stakes prediction markets tied to war and deaths can create incentives for manipulation and intimidation, prompting Polymarket to ban the accounts involved and lawmakers in Washington to push legislation like the Death Bets Act to ban contracts tied to war, assassinations, or fatalities.

articles.title: ORMR: FUNDING RATE TRADING VIA PENDLE BOROS
articles.summary: ORMR is an open-source automated trading bot that captures yield from funding rate dislocations through Pendle's Boros protocol, using Synth's AI forecasting network (200+ competing ML models on Bittensor) for volatility predictions and liquidation cascade detection. The bot runs three core strategies – carry trades on fixed/floating rate spreads, volatility regime plays positioning ahead of funding spikes, and liquidation catalyst trades front-running overleveraged position cascades. A 90-day backtest from December 2025 through March 2026 showed a 2,868% return on $1,000 starting capital across 399 trades with a 64.7% win rate.

articles.title: MESSARI OPENS INSTITUTIONAL DATA LAYER TO AGENTS VIA X402
articles.summary: Messari launched x402-enabled API endpoints allowing AI agents and developers to access institutional-grade crypto intelligence via per-request USDC micropayments on Base with no account, API key, or contract required. Integration paths include Coinbase Payments MCP, OpenClaw, and direct TypeScript/Python SDKs. x402 transaction volumes have surged 700%+ with average transaction size declining to ~$0.06, signaling genuine micropayment adoption.

articles.title: WHY PUBLIC AI MODELS WON'T GIVE RETAIL AN EDGE
articles.summary: Research replicating the NeurIPS best paper "Artificial Hivemind" in a crypto trading context shows that GPT-5.4, Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and Qwen3 Max all recommend identical trades (buy SOL) across 150 experiments when given the same 30-second orderbook data – even at high temperature settings. The homogeneity implies that unsophisticated retail traders using basic AI prompts will herd into identical positions, with first-movers profiting and latecomers serving as exit liquidity. Expert traders with richer context may maintain an edge, but public models with basic inputs are structurally unlikely to generate sustained alpha.

articles.title: THE BASE BUILDER'S PLAYBOOK
articles.summary: Integrate Coinbase tooling early for both product improvement and ecosystem promotion, build revenue-generating businesses rather than projects (since vibecoding has eliminated the moat around shipping), leverage Base's distribution power over grants, and integrate ERC-8021 builder codes for onchain attribution ahead of Base's token launch. The ecosystem rewards traction and execution over requests and pitch decks.

articles.title: AUTOMATING CRYPTO RESEARCH WITH AI
articles.summary: It is possible to build an AI-augmented crypto research workflow using three layers: signal detection (Lookonchain, Nansen smart money alerts), context investigation (Arkham wallet mapping, Dune SQL queries with AI-generated queries), and LLM synthesis (Claude for deep analysis over large data sets, Perplexity for cited sources). The system reduces daily research from 4+ hours to ~30 minutes through structured prompt templates for protocol deep dives, wallet behavior analysis, and narrative-vs-reality checks. Expert tips include never trusting AI outputs blindly, using AI for research rather than execution speed, and matching tools to tasks based on context window capabilities.

articles.title: WITH THANH LE: HOW VIETNAM LEAVES THE WILD WEST BEHIND
articles.summary: Vietnam ranks top five globally in crypto adoption with 20 million holders. This post details the transition from speculative scams to a 2025-2030 national strategy. This shift provides regulatory clarity for developers and investors, moving the ecosystem toward institutional maturity and tokenized real-world assets.

articles.title: BITCOIN EYES $75,000, NEARING 25% BOUNCE FROM FEBRUARY BOTTOM
articles.summary: Bitcoin rose 3.9% to $74,500, recovering 25% from its February low.

articles.title: BITMINE BUYS 60,999 ETHER AS TOM LEE TOUTS CRYPTO STRENGTH AMID IRAN WAR
articles.summary: Bitmine Immersion Technologies acquired 60,999 ether, bringing total holdings to 4.6 million tokens worth $10 billion.

articles.title: DRV: SINGLE-TOKEN PROTOCOL FOR ONCHAIN OPTIONS
articles.summary: Derive, the leading onchain options protocol with $22B+ in cumulative notional volume, has a single-token structure where DRV serves as the sole governance, compensation, and value accrual mechanism, with no equity layer or outside investors.

articles.title: PREDICTIONS MARKETS OFTEN HAVE VERY LOW LIQUIDITY; BE CAREFUL CITING THEM
articles.summary: Prediction markets often lack the liquidity required for accurate signaling.
